command:
echo "=== vm 192.168.0.192 ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.192 "bash -s" << 'HOOKEOF'

# Check if dhcpcd present
if ! command -v dhcpcd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  no-dhcpcd-skip"
  exit 0
fi
# Backup
sudo cp /etc/resolv.conf /etc/resolv.conf.bak-20260610 2>/dev/null
sudo cp /etc/dhcpcd.conf /etc/dhcpcd.conf.bak-20260610 2>/dev/null
# Add nohook
grep -q "nohook resolv.conf" /etc/dhcpcd.conf 2>/dev/null || echo "nohook resolv.conf" | sudo tee -a /etc/dhcpcd.conf >/dev/null
# Write correct resolv.conf
printf "nameserver 8.8.8.8\nnameserver 8.8.4.4\nnameserver 1.1.1.1\n" | sudo tee /etc/resolv.conf >/dev/null
# Verify
if grep -q "8.8.8.8" /etc/resolv.conf && getent hosts github.com >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  OK - dns works"
else
  echo "  WARN - check manually"
fi

HOOKEOF
